debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ D < @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  have h_lt : D ≤ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    -- Use the refinement_le lemma to establish the refinement relation
    exact refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  -- Derive the strict refinement from the existence of a non-singleton decomposition
  have h_lt_strict : ¬(refinement B hB hB' hB'' ≤ D) := by
    rintro h
    -- Extract the existence condition H
    rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hB_ne⟩
    -- Use the antisymmetry of the refinement relation to derive a contradiction
    have h₁ : N ∈ D := hN
    have h₂ : B N h₁ ≠ {N} := hB_ne
    -- Use the fact that the refinement is not a singleton to derive a contradiction
    have h₃ : N = sSup (B N h₁) := hB N h₁
    have h₄ : sSupIndep (B N h₁) := hB' N h₁
    have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ B N h₁ := hB'' N h₁
    -- Use the refinement condition to show that the refinement cannot be less than or equal to D
    have h₆ : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = ⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN := rfl
    -- Use the fact that B N h₁ is not a singleton to derive a contradiction
    have h₇ : ∃ (x : PersistenceSubmodule M), x ∈ B N h₁ ∧ x ≠ N := by
      by_contra h₇
      push_neg at h₇
      have h₈ : B N h₁ ⊆ {N} := by
        intro x hx
        have h₉ := h₇ x
        by_cases h₁₀ : x = N
        · simp_all
        · exfalso
          have h₁₁ := h₉ hx
          simp_all
      have h₉ : B N h₁ = {N} := by
        apply Set.Subset.antisymm
        · exact h₈
        · intro x hx
          simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
          rw [hx]
          have h₁₀ : N ∈ B N h₁ := by
            have h₁₁ : sSup (B N h₁) = N := by
              rw [h₃]
            have h₁₂ : N ∈ B N h₁ := by
              by_contra h₁₂
              have h₁₃ : sSup (B N h₁) < N := by
                have h₁₄ : sSup (B N h₁) < N := by
                  apply sSup_lt_of_nonempty
                  · -- Show that B N h₁ is nonempty
                    by_contra h₁₅
                    have h₁₆ : B N h₁ = ∅ := by
                      simp_all [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty]
                    have h₁₇ : sSup (B N h₁) = ⊥ := by
                      simp [h₁₆]
                    rw [h₁₇] at h₃
                    have h₁₈ : (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ≠ N := by
                      intro h₁₉
                      have h₂₀ : ⊥ ∉ B N h₁ := hB'' N h₁
                      have h₂₁ : (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ∈ B N h₁ := by
                        simp_all
                      contradiction
                    simp_all
                  · -- Show that N is an upper bound for B N h₁
                    intro x hx
                    have h₁₅ : x ≤ N := by
                      have h₁₆ : x ∈ B N h₁ := hx
                      have h₁₇ : sSup (B N h₁) = N := by
                        rw [h₃]
                      have h₁₈ : x ≤ sSup (B N h₁) := le_sSup hx
                      rw [h₁₇] at h₁₈
                      exact h₁₈
                    exact h₁₅
                  · -- Show that N is not in B N h₁
                    intro h₁₉
                    simp_all
                exact h₁₄
              have h₁₅ : sSup (B N h₁) < N := h₁₃
              have h₁₆ : sSup (B N h₁) = N := by
                rw [h₃]
              linarith
            simp_all
          simp_all
        <;> aesop
      simp_all
    -- Use the fact that B N h₁ is not a singleton to derive a contradiction
    rcases h₇ with ⟨x, hx, hx'⟩
    have h₈ : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
      simp only [DirectSumDecomposition.refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion] at *
      aesop
    have h₉ : x ∉ D := by
      intro h₉
      have h₁₀ : x ∈ D := h₉
      have h₁₁ : x ∈ B N h₁ := hx
      have h₁₂ : x ≤ N := by
        have h₁₃ : x ∈ B N h₁ := hx
        have h₁₄ : sSup (B N h₁) = N := by
          rw [h₃]
        have h₁₅ : x ≤ sSup (B N h₁) := le_sSup hx
        rw [h₁₄] at h₁₅
        exact h₁₅
      have h₁₃ : x = N := by
        have h₁₄ : x ∈ D := h₁₀
        have h₁₅ : N ∈ D := h₁
        have h₁₆ : sSupIndep (D.carrier) := D.sSupIndep'
        have h₁₇ : Disjoint x N := by
          have h₁₈ : Disjoint x (sSup D) := by
            have h₁₉ : x ∈ D := h₁₄
            have h₂₀ : Disjoint x (sSup D) := by
              apply D.sSupIndep'
              <;> aesop
            exact h₂₀
          have h₂₁ : sSup D = ⊤ := D.sSup_eq_top'
          rw [h₂₁] at h₁₈
          have h₂₂ : Disjoint x ⊤ := h₁₈
          simp [disjoint_top] at h₂₂
          <;> simp_all [disjoint_top]
          <;> aesop
        have h₂₃ : x ≤ N := h₁₂
        have h₂₄ : Disjoint x N := h₁₇
        have h₂₅ : x = ⊥ := by
          have h₂₆ : x ⊓ N = ⊥ := by
            rw [inf_eq_bot]
            exact h₂₄
          have h₂₇ : x ≤ N := h₁₂
          have h₂₈ : x ⊓ N = x := by
            rw [inf_eq_left.mpr h₂₇]
          rw [h₂₈] at h₂₆
          exact h₂₆
        have h₂₉ : x = N := by
          have h₃₀ : x ≤ N := h₁₂
          have h₃₁ : x = ⊥ := h₂₅
          have h₃₂ : N = ⊥ := by
            have h₃₃ : sSup (B N h₁) = N := by
              rw [h₃]
            have h₃₄ : ⊥ ∉ B N h₁ := hB'' N h₁
            have h₃₅ : sSupIndep (B N h₁) := hB' N h₁
            have h₃₆ : x ∈ B N h₁ := hx
            simp_all [h₃₁]
            <;> aesop
          simp_all
        exact h₂₉
      simp_all
    have h₁₀ : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := h₈
    have h₁₁ : x ∉ D := h₉
    have h₁₂ : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier ⊆ D := by
      intro y hy
      have h₁₃ : y ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := hy
      have h₁₄ : y ∈ D := by
        have h₁₅ : refinement B hB hB' hB'' ≤ D := h
        have h₁₆ : y ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := h₁₃
        have h₁₇ : y ∈ D := by
          have h₁₈ : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier ⊆ D := by
            intro z hz
            have h₁₉ : z ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := hz
            have h₂₀ : z ∈ D := by
              have h₂₁ : refinement B hB hB' hB'' ≤ D := h
              have h₂₂ : z ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := h₁₉
              have h₂₃ : z ∈ D := by
                -- Use the fact that refinement B hB hB' hB'' ≤ D to show that z ∈ D
                simp_all [DirectSumDecomposition.le_iff, IsRefinement]
                <;> aesop
              exact h₂₃
            exact h₂₀
          exact h₁₈ h₁₃
        exact h₁₇
      exact h₁₄
    have h₁₃ : x ∈ D := h₁₂ h₁₀
    contradiction
  -- Combine the two parts to get the strict refinement
  exact lt_of_le_of_not_le h_lt h_lt_strict
